overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dark futuristic urban underpass at night, transitioning into a neon-lit commercial walkway with yellow lighting, and concluding with a green sports car driving past on wet reflective streets. The scene features high-quality ray-traced lighting, dense cyberpunk architecture, and atmospheric neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete urban underpass with overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark underpass, maintaining a consistent pace along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap looking at phone while walking toward camera
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking away from camera down the underpass

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall running along the left side of the walkway
yellow textured safety paving along the edge of the sidewalk
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the underpass ceiling
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed concrete underpass at night. The camera follows a character walking forward along a sidewalk marked with yellow tactile paving. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one in a red cap looking at their phone. Overhead fluorescent lights provide artificial illumination while a street barrier separates the walkway from the empty road.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass transition zone approaching commercial district

events.description: ambient light increases as the underpass opens toward the illuminated commercial area ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass, now visible from behind wearing a vest with colorful patterns, approaching the lit commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark shorts walking toward camera

entered.detail: large illuminated entrance to a commercial building with glass facade
elevated pedestrian bridge or building overhang spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the underpass as the environment gradually brightens. The concrete walls give way to commercial building facades ahead. The character, now visible from behind wearing a distinctive vest, passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The lighting shifts from dim underpass illumination to the brighter glow of the approaching commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon lighting

events.description: passes through a cyan neon-lit archway into a covered commercial walkway with yellow ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial area, passing vending machines and neon signs

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sports car approaching slowly in the background

entered.detail: futuristic archway entrance illuminated with cyan neon lights
rows of bright yellow linear neon lights running along the ceiling
large red cylindrical support columns lining the walkway
wall of illuminated vending machines and food service counters
red neon signage with asian characters and 24/7 indicator

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a striking cyan neon archway into a covered commercial walkway. The environment transforms into a vibrant corridor with yellow neon ceiling lights and red structural pillars. Vending machines line the left wall while a futuristic green sports car becomes visible on the road to the right. The atmosphere shifts from the muted underpass to a vividly lit cyberpunk commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street with wet reflective asphalt

events.description: green sports car drives past from right to left, headlights reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: stopping to observe or track the green sports car as it drives past on the wet street

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sports car with glowing accents driving past slowly, headlights illuminating the wet road

entered.detail: dark wet asphalt street reflecting the neon lights and car headlights
yellow and black striped bollards separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts focus to track a futuristic green sports car driving past on the wet asphalt. The vehicle's headlights and neon accents reflect off the rain-slicked road surface. The character appears to stop and observe the car as it passes from right to left. The environment remains under the covered walkway structure with red pillars now visible to the right, while the road dominates the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim urban underpass that gradually transforms into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins in a dark, enclosed concrete tunnel, following a character along a sidewalk with yellow tactile paving as sparse pedestrians pass under artificial fluorescent lights. As the character moves forward, the concrete walls give way to building facades and the lighting shifts from dim shadows to a brighter glow. The scene then expands as the character passes through a striking cyan neon archway into a covered walkway defined by yellow ceiling lights, red structural pillars, and glowing vending machines. Finally, the camera shifts focus to track a futuristic green sports car as it drives across the wet, reflective asphalt, its neon accents shimmering on the rain-slicked road.
